Babylon A.D. (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,532,572Details
International Box Office $47,683,925
Worldwide Box Office $70,216,497
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $18,055,464
Total $18,055,464
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,484,627 (42.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,390 opening theaters/3,425 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $37,533,362

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 29th, 2008 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: January 6th, 2009 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, language and some sexuality.
Running Time: 100 minutes
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 2020s, Near Future
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Babylon A.D., SAS, Babylon Films, StudioCanal, M6 Films, Canal Plus, Cinecinema
Production Countries: France
Languages: English
